## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and `pytest -q` is green
- [ ] `ruff check .` is green
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (under "Unreleased")
- [ ] No new required third-party dependency for the SDK path
- [ ] Backend-agnostic (no hardcoded single-backend internals)
